steps.title: Fit the line from the two points
steps.content: The graph contains $(-2,3)$ and $(4,-5)$. Put those two points into Desmos and fit $y_1\sim m x_1+b$ to get the linear function directly.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Choice C is the only function with that slope and intercept. It also checks both points: $f(-2)=3$ and $f(4)=-5$. Choice C is correct.
